prompt: Logo wordmark on pure black background. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase. All text is pure white (#FFFFFF) except the period dot at the end which is bright yellow (#FAFA00). CRITICAL: The ENTIRE text uses ONE SINGLE typeface — a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold. Same font, same weight for every single letter. Wide rectangular letterforms with thick strokes and sharp 90-degree corners. The text spans most of the horizontal canvas — this is the large hero version, dominant and powerful. No icon, no symbol. Vector quality, perfectly crisp, flat design.
negative_prompt: icon, symbol, graphic, 3D, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, complex, busy, decorative, serif, script, handwritten, thin lines, light weight, gray text, different fonts, mixed typefaces, rounded font, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, noise, grunge
